title: Smoky Roasted Padron Pilaf in Comal
description: A tangy, dense, adventurous Mediterranean dish featuring padron peppers roasted to perfection and served in a comal for an authentic smoky flavor.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 450 degrees F.
Peel and finely chop the celery root, onions, and garlic. Rinse the padron peppers thoroughly.
In a large bowl, mix together olive oil, paprika, smoke seasoning, salt, and lemon zest. Add the chopped vegetables and padron peppers into the mixture.
Gently toss until all ingredients are coated evenly with the dressing.
Transfer the mixture to a lightly oiled comal or cast iron skillet and roast for about 20 minutes on medium heat, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
